docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY HUNTER, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT LEVINE, REN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
